response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:47: Identified '波に名前をつけること、僕らの呼吸に終わりがあること。' (Nami ni namae wo tsukeru koto, bokura no kokyuu ni owari ga aru koto.) performed by Kobo Kanaeru. Search tool confirmed artist: こんにちは谷田さん. Lyrics transcribed from video due to lack of full online source. 2. 03:48-05:01: Identified 'ぷ・れ・あ・で・す！' (Pleiades!) performed by Kobo Kanaeru and Oozora Subaru. Confirmed artist: mitsu (composer 滝澤 俊輔). Lyrics found via web search. 3. Finalized scene boundaries and metadata.
response.global_summary: A musical performance video featuring two performances by hololive VTubers. Kobo Kanaeru performs '波に名前をつけること、僕らの呼吸に終わりがあること。' (Nami ni namae wo tsukeru koto, bokura no kokyuu ni owari ga aru koto.) followed by a duet of 'ぷ・れ・あ・で・す！' (Pleiades!) by Kobo Kanaeru and Oozora Subaru.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru performs the song '波に名前をつけること、僕らの呼吸に終わりがあること。'. The scene features stage lighting and holographic effects matching the song's atmosphere.
scenes.song_title: 波に名前をつけること、僕らの呼吸に終わりがあること。

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru and Oozora Subaru perform the song 'ぷ・れ・あ・で・す！'. The performance is high-energy, with both characters dancing together on stage.
